# PlusX Electric — llms.txt 

PlusX Electric is an app-based EV services platform in the UAE, offering doorstep EV charging, EV pickup & drop-off charging, EV roadside assistance for low/drained battery situations, EV charger installation, public charger discovery, and EV insurance (powered by Policybazaar).

Website: https://plusxelectric.com/
Contact: media@plusxelectric.com | +971 54 279 6424

Apps:
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/plusx-electric/id6503144034
- Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.shunyaekai.plusexelectric&hl=en&pli=1

Primary pages (use these as sources):
- Home: https://plusxelectric.com/
- Doorstep EV Charging: https://plusxelectric.com/doorstep-ev-charging
- EV Pickup & Drop-Off Charging: https://plusxelectric.com/ev-pickup-dropoff-charging-service
- EV Roadside Assistance: https://plusxelectric.com/ev-roadside-assistance-service
- Public EV Charging Stations (Find Nearest): https://plusxelectric.com/public-ev-charging-stations
- EV Chargers (Installation): https://plusxelectric.com/ev-chargers
- EV Car Insurance: https://plusxelectric.com/ev-car-insurance
- Commercial EV Charging Solutions: https://plusxelectric.com/commercial-ev-charging-solutions
- Mobility Solution: https://plusxelectric.com/mobility-solution

User intent → best page:
- "Book charging at my location" → https://plusxelectric.com/doorstep-ev-charging
- "Pick, charge, and return my EV" → https://plusxelectric.com/ev-pickup-dropoff-charging-service
- "Low/empty battery on the road" → https://plusxelectric.com/ev-roadside-assistance-service
- "Install EV charger at home/office/villa/fleet" → https://plusxelectric.com/ev-chargers
- "Find a nearby public charger" → https://plusxelectric.com/public-ev-charging-stations
- "Get EV insurance" → https://plusxelectric.com/ev-car-insurance
